hero.title: Hi, I'm Ivo André
projects.title: Programming Projects
projects.politicapt.desc: Award-winning project with the Geração+ Prize aimed at democratizing access to political information in Portugal.
projects.unavailable.desc: Custom maintenance page for the PolíticaPT project with modern and informative design.
projects.visumaker.desc: Python application for automatic generation of visual documents from customizable templates.
projects.discordpa.desc: A Public Address (PA) system for Discord that broadcasts audio from any computer device to multiple voice channels simultaneously.
projects.prs.desc: Official platform for the Precision Rifle Series community in Portugal, developed to centralize competition management, regulations, and the sharing of technical knowledge about long-range precision shooting.
hobbies.title: Hobbies & Interests
hobbies.satisfactory.desc: Official translator for Satisfactory game to Portuguese. Name featured in the official game credits.
hobbies.modrinth.desc: Creator of official translation guidelines and Proofreader for Modrinth platform, helping standardize translations across multiple languages.
hobbies.revanced.desc: Active contributor to ReVanced project translations, making the app accessible to Portuguese users.
hobbies.photography.title: Landscape Photography
hobbies.photography.desc: I capture the beauty of nature through the lens as a hobby
hobbies.adobe.title: Adobe Creative Suite
hobbies.adobe.desc: Video, image and motion graphics editing with Premiere, Photoshop and After Effects
hobbies.gaming.title: Quality Games
hobbies.gaming.desc: Gaming enthusiast focused on narrative experiences and indie titles
contact.title: Let's Work Together?
contact.desc: I'm always open to new projects and collaborations. If you have an idea or just want to say hello, don't hesitate to contact me!
